support.summary: No CEO action required; rep-level ROI/POC and CFO intro are the plays.
support.detail: A2Dominion ($150K, Formal Evaluation, win 50) is progressing normally: Claire Hudson is scoping a paid 1-month POC (5-10 use cases) with champion Darren Stanley after a 30 Jun check-in. The economic buyer CFO is identified but unengaged, and securing that intro is a standard rep/RSD motion via Darren, not a CEO peer-connect. No blocked discount, roadmap commitment, or SE guarantee is on record that only the CEO could unlock.
support.metric: $150K deal, win 50, POC 5-10 use cases being scoped
support.why_not_vp: Every open move (ROI model, paid POC scoping, CFO introduction) is standard rep/RSD execution; nothing requires the CEO's authority or a peer relationship.

monitor.reason: Deal is active and rep-driven with a 30 Jun call; no recent slip, slowdown, or competitor edge to watch.
